ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemons" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "pokedex_id" INTEGER /* Pokédex ID of the Pokémon */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Abilities of the Pokémon */,
  "typing" TEXT /* Typing of the Pokémon (e.g., Grass, Poison) */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* HP stat of the Pokémon */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_attack" INTEGER /* Special attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "special_defense" INTEGER /* Special defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the Pokémon */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the Pokémon */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation of the Pokémon */,
  "female_rate" REAL /* Female rate of the Pokémon */,
  "genderless" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is genderless */,
  "legendary_mythical" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is legendary or mythical */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is the default form */,
  "forms_switchable" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon has multiple forms */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience of the Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "egg_groups" TEXT /* Egg groups of the Pokémon */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness of the Pokémon */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the Pokémon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Normal, Fire, Water) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "pokemon_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon-type pair */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "typing_order" INTEGER /* Order of the typing (e.g., primary or secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_types_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type-effectiveness pair */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "normal_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Normal type */,
  "fire_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Fire type */,
  "water_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Water type */,
  "electric_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Electric type */,
  "grass_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Grass type */,
  "ice_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Ice type */,
  "fighting_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Fighting type */,
  "poison_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Poison type */,
  "ground_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Ground type */,
  "flying_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Flying type */,
  "psychic_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Psychic type */,
  "bug_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Bug type */,
  "rock_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Rock type */,
  "ghost_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Ghost type */,
  "dragon_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Dragon type */,
  "dark_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Dark type */,
  "steel_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Steel type */,
  "fairy_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the type against Fairy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effectiveness_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "evolves_from" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon it evolves from */,
  "evolves_into" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon it evolves into */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the evolution occurs */,
  "evolution_item" TEXT /* Item required for evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_effectiveness" (
  "pokemon_effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon-effectiveness pair */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_effectiveness_effectiveness_id FOREIGN KEY ("effectiveness_id") REFERENCES effectiveness ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_effectiveness_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation (e.g., Kanto, Johto) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Kanto, Johto) */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_regions" (
  "pokemon_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon-region pair */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_regions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_abilities" (
  "pokemon_ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon-ability pair */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_abilities_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_abilities_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)
